[[File:Imaginal.svg|thumb|Diagram from [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 48<ref name=":0">[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 48 0:48:10</ref>]]
The Imaginal is a concept used in the works of Corbin and Jung<ref name=":0" /> It may be the analogue to the Kantian middle term as expressed in reference to non-propositional ideas and ways of [[knowing]]<ref name=":0" />

It relates to the concept of the [[transjective]].<ref name=":0" />

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Imaginal]][[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Pages]]
